assertions.description: BQ25756E feedback divider R711 (249k) / R713 (14k) from +VCHARGE_O to FB to FBG missed -- divider detector expects GND as bottom net, not dedicated FBG pin
R701/R702 (5 milliohm, 1W) current sense resistors on ACP/ACN and SRP/SRN pins not detected
TPS3701DDCR (IC803) function not classified -- should be 'voltage supervisor' or 'voltage detector'
Regulator output_rail is null despite FB pin connecting through divider to +3V3 net
REVIEW: LTC3126 estimated_vout=2.41V using assumed Vref=0.6V -- actual Vref=0.8V (VSET pins to GND), correct Vout=3.3V matching +3V3 output rail
REVIEW: IC801/IC802 LTC7000EMSE gate drivers have 0 pins parsed due to lib_name/lib_id mismatch -- lib_symbols keyed by local name but lookup uses lib_id
REVIEW: Bootstrap cap + power inductor misidentified as RF matching network in GEODE power_auxiliary
